'''âth-n-z''' ('''kathanaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pubertymaxx|pubertymaxx]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pubertymaxx|pubertymaxx]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-n-z
|-
! Lemma
| kathanaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithanaz|thithanaz]] || [[word:jithanaz|jithanaz]] || [[word:shithanaz|shithanaz]] || [[word:kithanaz|kithanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthanaz|thuthuthanaz]] || [[word:jujuthanaz|jujuthanaz]] || [[word:shushuthanaz|shushuthanaz]] || [[word:kukuthanaz|kukuthanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthanaz|thuthanaz]] || [[word:juthanaz|juthanaz]] || [[word:shuthanaz|shuthanaz]] || [[word:kuthanaz|kuthanaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthanaz|thuthanaz]] || [[word:juthanaz|juthanaz]] || [[word:shuthanaz|shuthanaz]] || [[word:kuthanaz|kuthanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethanaz|thethanaz]] || [[word:jethanaz|jethanaz]] || [[word:shethanaz|shethanaz]] || [[word:kethanaz|kethanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothanaz|thothothanaz]] || [[word:jojothanaz|jojothanaz]] || [[word:shoshothanaz|shoshothanaz]] || [[word:kokothanaz|kokothanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothanaz|thothanaz]] || [[word:jothanaz|jothanaz]] || [[word:shothanaz|shothanaz]] || [[word:kothanaz|kothanaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothanaz|thothanaz]] || [[word:jothanaz|jothanaz]] || [[word:shothanaz|shothanaz]] || [[word:kothanaz|kothanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthanaz|thĂŠthanaz]] || [[word:jĂŠthanaz|jĂŠthanaz]] || [[word:shĂŠthanaz|shĂŠthanaz]] || [[word:kĂŠthanaz|kĂŠthanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathanaz|thathathanaz]] || [[word:jajathanaz|jajathanaz]] || [[word:shashathanaz|shashathanaz]] || [[word:kakathanaz|kakathanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathanaz|thathanaz]] || [[word:jathanaz|jathanaz]] || [[word:shathanaz|shathanaz]] || [[word:kathanaz|kathanaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathanaz|thathanaz]] || [[word:jathanaz|jathanaz]] || [[word:shathanaz|shathanaz]] || [[word:kathanaz|kathanaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathanaz|shathanaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathanaz|goshathanaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathanaz|gokishathanaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathanaznĂŒ|shathanaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathanaznknĂŒ|goshathanaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanaznĂŒ|gokishathanaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathanazshĂ«|shathanazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathanaznkshĂ«|goshathanaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathanazshĂ«|gokishathanazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanazro|shathanazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanaznkro|goshathanaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanazro|gokishathanazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanazmu|shathanazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanaznkmu|goshathanaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanazmu|gokishathanazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathanazsher|shathanazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathanaznksher|goshathanaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathanazsher|gokishathanazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathanazng|shathanazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathanaznkng|goshathanaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathanazng|gokishathanazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathanazya|shathanazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathanaznkya|goshathanaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathanazya|gokishathanazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathanazyam|shathanazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathanaznkyam|goshathanaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathanazyam|gokishathanazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanaznĂŒshĂ«|shathanaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshathanaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishathanaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanaznĂŒro|shathanaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanaznknĂŒro|goshathanaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanaznĂŒro|gokishathanaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanaznĂŒmu|shathanaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanaznknĂŒmu|goshathanaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanaznĂŒmu|gokishathanaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanazshĂ«nĂŒ|shathanazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathanaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathanazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanazshĂ«ro|shathanazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanaznkshĂ«ro|goshathanaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanazshĂ«ro|gokishathanazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanazshĂ«mu|shathanazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanaznkshĂ«mu|goshathanaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanazshĂ«mu|gokishathanazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanazronĂŒ|shathanazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanaznkronĂŒ|goshathanaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanazronĂŒ|gokishathanazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanazroshĂ«|shathanazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanaznkroshĂ«|goshathanaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanazroshĂ«|gokishathanazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathanazromu|shathanazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathanaznkromu|goshathanaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathanazromu|gokishathanazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathanazmunĂŒ|shathanazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathanaznkmunĂŒ|goshathanaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathanazmunĂŒ|gokishathanazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathanazmushĂ«|shathanazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathanaznkmushĂ«|goshathanaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathanazmushĂ«|gokishathanazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathanazmuro|shathanazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathanaznkmuro|goshathanaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathanazmuro|gokishathanazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|2edd495}}
